step.0
----
apt-get install build-essential dh-autoreconf libncurses5-dev tftp-hpa tftpd-hpa xinetd nfs-common nfs-kernel-server samba gcc-multilib g++-multilib gdb-multiarch net-tools pkg-config v4l-utils dh-make libgmp-dev libelf-dev xserver-xorg-core xserver-xorg x11-xserver-utils libxkbcommon-dev libxkbcommon-x11-dev libxcb-icccm4-dev libxcb-image0-dev libxcb-render-util0-dev libxcb-util0-dev libxcb-keysyms1-dev python2.7-dev dpkg-dev xfonts-75dpi xfonts-100dpi xfonts-base ninja-build libguestfs-tools libfdt-dev libssl-dev libglib2.0-dev libpixman-1-dev zlib1g-dev python3-pip qemu-system bridge-utils uml-utilities virtualenv python3 devscripts imagemagick python2 sparse meson netcat bc lzop texinfo bison flex make automake autoconf gdb cscope ctags tree git dos2unix minicom ttyrec cmake unzip astyle indent slurm socat tcpdump ipcalc nmap ffmpeg nano vim gawk screen tmux valgrind autogen ethtool rsync dejagnu keepalived gdbserver qemu-user-static debootstrap binfmt-support libncurses5-dev libmpfr-dev

step.1
----
mkdir -p /etc/qemu && echo "allow br0" > /etc/qemu/bridge.conf
echo "bridge">>/etc/modules

step.2 
----
systemctl status networking.service
nano /etc/network/interfaces
--
allow-hotplug br0
auto br0
iface br0 inet static
address 192.168.10.8
netmask 255.255.255.0
hwaddress 00:00:00:00:00:01
pre-up ip link set eth0 promisc on
#pre-up ethtool -s eth0 speed 1000 duplex full autoneg on 
pre-up ip tuntap add tap0 mode tap user root 
pre-up echo "1">/proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward
bridge_ports eth0 tap0

step.3
----
touch /usr/bin/tap && chmod a+x /usr/bin/tap 
nano /usr/bin/tap 
--
#!/bin/sh

set -x
if [ -n "$1" ];then
	#ip tuntap add $1 mode tap user `whoami`
	ip link set $1 promisc on
	ip link set $1 up
	#/usr/sbin/brctl addif br0 $1
	ip link set $1 master br0 
	exit 0
fi

step.4 
----
nano /etc/keepalived/keepalived.conf
--
vrrp_instance vrrp {
	state MASTER
	interface br0
	virtual_router_id 1
	priority 100
	advert_int 1
	virtual_ipaddress {
		192.168.0.8/24
		192.168.1.8/24
		192.168.2.8/24
		192.168.3.8/24
		192.168.4.8/24
		192.168.5.8/24
		192.168.6.8/24
		192.168.7.8/24
		192.168.8.8/24
		192.168.9.8/24
		192.168.10.8/24
		192.168.11.8/24
		192.168.12.8/24
		192.168.13.8/24
		192.168.14.8/24
		192.168.15.8/24
		192.168.16.8/24
		192.168.17.8/24
		192.168.18.8/24
		192.168.19.8/24
		192.168.20.8/24
		192.168.21.8/24
		192.168.22.8/24
		192.168.23.8/24
		192.168.24.8/24
		192.168.25.8/24
		192.168.26.8/24
		192.168.27.8/24
		192.168.28.8/24
		192.168.29.8/24
		192.168.30.8/24
		192.168.31.8/24
		192.168.32.8/24
		192.168.33.8/24
		192.168.34.8/24
		192.168.35.8/24
		192.168.36.8/24
		192.168.37.8/24
		192.168.38.8/24
		192.168.39.8/24
		192.168.40.8/24
		192.168.41.8/24
		192.168.42.8/24
		192.168.43.8/24
		192.168.44.8/24
		192.168.45.8/24
		192.168.46.8/24
		192.168.47.8/24
		192.168.48.8/24
		192.168.49.8/24
		192.168.50.8/24
		192.168.51.8/24
		192.168.52.8/24
		192.168.53.8/24
		192.168.54.8/24
		192.168.55.8/24
		192.168.56.8/24
		192.168.57.8/24
		192.168.58.8/24
		192.168.59.8/24
		192.168.60.8/24
		192.168.61.8/24
		192.168.62.8/24
		192.168.63.8/24
		192.168.64.8/24
		192.168.65.8/24
		192.168.66.8/24
		192.168.67.8/24

		192.168.96.8/24
		192.168.97.8/24
		192.168.98.8/24
		192.168.99.8/24
